subject: [PATCH v3 09/28] nfsd: add protocol support for CB_NOTIFY

2026-04-28.patch_summary: This patch adds support for the CB_NOTIFY protocol to the nfsd kernel module. It includes updates to the xdr (External Data Representation) files, which define the format of data exchanged between the client and server in an NFSv4.x connection. The patch also removes duplicate definitions from various header files and regenerates the xdr files. Additionally, it addresses conflicts with user-space constants by removing them from the kernel API and suggesting that users obtain these values from more authoritative sources.
